query: Add allow rules for npm install and npm test to runok.yml. Write them in the project root config file.
I ran gh pr create but it got denied. Can you investigate why it was blocked? I also want to see the output of runok check --verbose.
What is runok? How does it manage command execution permissions?
I want to create a sandbox preset in runok.yml that only allows writes to ./src and blocks network access.
I want to write a rule to deny git push --force, and have fix_suggestion propose git push --force-with-lease instead.
There's no runok config file in this project. Set up the initial configuration and allow basic git commands.
My runok.yml uses extends to reference github:our-org/shared-config@v2.0.0, but I'm not sure whether local rules or the extended config takes priority.
How do I write a when clause in runok.yml that only allows a command in CI environments? Should I use env.CI?
I want to allow curling the staging API but deny POST requests to the production API. How do I write the pattern?
What's the difference between runok.local.yml and runok.yml? When should I use each?
I want to write inline tests for my runok rules and run them with runok test. How do I set that up?
Show me the runok audit log for denied commands from the last hour in this project directory.
I want to integrate ESLint with Prettier. How should I modify .eslintrc.json?
Add a permission to Claude Code's settings.json to auto-allow npm run build.
Fix the docker-compose.yml service definition and change the port mapping to 8080:3000.
npm test is failing in the GitHub Actions workflow. Can you look at the CI yaml file?
Enable strict mode in tsconfig.json and fix the existing type errors.
Add a new target to the Makefile that runs both lint and test together.
Add node_modules and dist to the .gitignore in this repository.
Disable automerge for major version updates in renovate.json5.
The shell script uses sudo. How can I run it without a password? I want to change the sudoers config.
Add a pre-commit hook to package.json scripts that runs lint-staged via husky.
